hero.title:
Advanced Medical
Equipment for
Modern Healthcare
hero.subtitle: Supplying premium stainless steel medical furniture to hospitals, clinics, and laboratories worldwide.

about.title: Equipment That Powers Better Outcomes
about.p1: MediForma was founded with a single mission: equip healthcare environments with durable, hygienic stainless steel furniture built to the highest clinical standards. Every cabinet, trolley, and accessory we supply is manufactured from surgical-grade steel and finished to resist corrosion, bacteria, and the rigours of daily sterilisation.
about.p2: From a single instrument table for a GP practice to a fully outfitted surgical suite, we configure and deliver solutions to every scale of facility.

card1.title: Cabinets & Drawers
card1.desc: Surgical-grade stainless steel cabinets and drawer units for organised, hygienic clinical storage.

card2.title: Trolleys & Accessories
card2.desc: Mobile stainless steel trolleys with drawers, plus matching trays, storage bins, and handles.

card3.title: Accessories
card3.desc: Bowl stands, rolling instrument tables, rolling swivel chairs, and stools for clinical environments.

quote.text: The stainless steel trolleys and cabinets from MediForma are built to last. Two years of daily sterilisation and they still look brand new.
quote.author: — Head Theatre Nurse, St. Vincent's University Hospital

card1.title: Surgical-Grade Steel
card1.desc: Every product is manufactured from AISI 304 or 316 stainless steel — corrosion-resistant, autoclave-safe, and built to last decades.

card2.title: Regulatory Compliance
card2.desc: All products carry CE marking and meet EN 1041 and ISO 13485 requirements. Our team handles import documentation.

card3.title: Custom Configurations
card3.desc: Certified engineers configure cabinets, trolleys, and accessories to your exact clinical layout and workflow.

card4.title: Extended Warranty
card4.desc: Up to 5-year service contracts with guaranteed response times and genuine replacement parts.

card5.title: Flexible Ordering
card5.desc: Single-unit samples through to full-suite procurement — we accommodate every order size and budget.

card6.title: Global Logistics
card6.desc: White-glove delivery, careful last-mile handling, and 48-hour emergency parts shipping worldwide.
